title: pilosella fuernrohrii
intro: Pilosella fuernrohrii, also known as Fuernrohr's mouse-ear hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Pilosella fuernrohrii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
